content:
廼立皐門，皐門有伉。廼立應門，應門將將。

  皐門者，郭門也。周立郭門，外以禦暴，內以安民。伉，高大也。言其制雄壯。

  **所出**：《詩經 · 緜》 — https://zh.wikisource.org/wiki/詩經/緜
summary: A definition of "皐門" (city gate) from the *Book of Songs*, describing the Zhou dynasty's fortified outer gates as grand, majestic structures built for both defense and public safety.
title: 皐門
